2604.13035.title: SceneCritic: A Symbolic Evaluator for 3D Indoor Scene Synthesis
2604.13035.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) increasingly generate indoor scenes through intermediate structures such as layouts and scene graphs, yet evaluation still relies on LLM or VLM judges that score rendered views, making judgments sensitive to viewpoint, prompt phrasing, and hallucination. When the evaluator is unstable, it becomes difficult to determine whether a model has produced a spatially plausible scene or whether the output score reflects the choice of viewpoint, rendering, or prompt. We introduce SceneCritic, a symbolic evaluator for floor-plan-level layouts. SceneCritic's constraints are grounded in SceneOnto, a structured spatial ontology we construct by aggregating indoor scene priors from 3D-FRONT, ScanNet, and Visual Genome. SceneOnto traverses this ontology to jointly verify semantic, orientation, and geometric coherence across object relationships, providing object-level and relationship-level assessments that identify specific violations and successful placements. Furthermore, we pair SceneCritic with an iterative refinement test bed that probes how models build and revise spatial structure under different critic modalities: a rule-based critic using collision constraints as feedback, an LLM critic operating on the layout as text, and a VLM critic operating on rendered observations. Through extensive experiments, we show that (a) SceneCritic aligns substantially better with human judgments than VLM-based evaluators, (b) text-only LLMs can outperform VLMs on semantic layout quality, and (c) image-based VLM refinement is the most effective critic modality for semantic and orientation correction.
2604.13035.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）和視覺-語言模型（VLMs）越來越多地通過中介結構，如佈局和場景圖，生成室內場景，但評估仍然依賴於LLM或VLM評審，這些評審會對渲染的視圖進行打分，使得判斷對視點、提示措辭和幻覺敏感。當評估者不穩定時，很難確定模型是否生成了一個空間上合理的場景，或者輸出分數是否反映了視點、渲染或提示的選擇。我們介紹了SceneCritic，一個用於平面圖級佈局的符號評估器。SceneCritic的約束基於SceneOnto，這是一個結構化的空間本體，我們通過聚合來自3D-FRONT、ScanNet和Visual Genome的室內場景先驗來構建。SceneOnto遍歷這個本體，以共同驗證物體關係的語義、一致性和幾何一致性，提供物體級和關係級的評估，識別具體的違規行為和成功的放置。此外，我們將SceneCritic與一個迭代精煉測試平台配對，該平台探測模型在不同評審模式下如何構建和修訂空間結構：一個基於規則的評審使用碰撞約束作為反饋，一個LLM評審將佈局作為文本操作，還有一個VLM評審對渲染的觀察進行操作。通過廣泛的實驗，我們顯示（a）SceneCritic與人類評判的對齊程度顯著優於基於VLM的評估者，（b）僅文本的LLMs在語義佈局質量上可以超越VLMs，以及（c）基於圖像的VLM精煉是語義和方向修正最有效的評審模式。
2604.13035.author: Kathakoli Sengupta et.al.
2604.13035.authors: Kathakoli Sengupta, Kai Ao, Paola Cascante-Bonilla
